## Skills
React, Vite, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, Python, Java, C, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, SEO, Website Testing, Data Analysis, Machine Learning, Google Scholar meta tags, deployment debugging, Vercel, Render.

## Technology Stack
Frontend: React, Vite, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, responsive UI, accessibility.
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, JWT authentication, email/OTP workflows.
Database: MongoDB, MySQL, GridFS.
Data and ML: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, data analysis, predictive modeling.
SEO and QA: sitemap, robots.txt, OpenGraph, Twitter Cards, schema.org JSON-LD, Google Scholar metadata, website testing.

## Projects
- BoostPilot AI: AI creator platform for media analysis, captions, hooks, hashtags, content suggestions, thumbnail ideas, reports, and platform optimization. Stack: React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, GridFS, JWT, AI API, Vercel, Render. URL: https://boostpilotai.vercel.app/
- Support Kindness / Care Contribution: Community impact platform with transparency reports, gallery, contact, and admin dashboard. Stack: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, image upload, Vercel, Render. URL: https://support-kindness.vercel.app/
- CharityVibe: Donation and charity support platform with donation flow, volunteer/support pages, responsive UI, and community design. Stack: React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Email/OTP, Vercel, Render. URL: https://charityvibe-frontend.vercel.app/
- OptiResume: AI resume builder concept with templates, live preview, PDF/DOCX export, uploaded resume extraction, and premium template system. Stack: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB.
- Stock Market Prediction ML: Machine learning stock market prediction project using Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, data analysis, and predictive modeling. URL: https://github.com/adityamishra52/Stock-Market-Prediction-ML

## Experience
Current role: Web Developer / Website Testing & SEO Executive at Manuscript Technomedia LLP.
Work includes web development, frontend/backend improvements, website testing, SEO metadata, Google Scholar tags, sitemap, robots.txt, article page testing, PDF/DOI/citation checks, React, Vite, Node.js, MongoDB, Vercel, and Render deployment debugging.
